data.content: The completion-notification slice is not correct yet: useScopeRefinementNotifications() only invalidates beat list queries, so an already-open beat detail view stays stale after refinement completes. See src/hooks/use-scope-refinement-notifications.ts:34-35 and the detail query in src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx:55. Direct coverage for the status endpoint/hook contract is also missing.
